candidate_grammar.boundary: All measurement relations assembled from admitted Fold distinctions, exact reference pairing, held observation records, target-inaccessible execution and finite generated support.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of carrier, relation, provenance, prediction access, measurement record, row retention, finite generality and extra-rule forms.

excluded_inputs: semantic numerical zero, negative proof magnitude, irrational, imaginary or floating proof value
measurement target access before prediction seal
a conventional unit, equation or measured constant selecting the Fold relation
selected favorable rows, free scales and fitted parameters
intended_certificate: Complete 256-form census, sole survivor, independent regeneration and blind post-seal external comparison.
statement: A measured value is forced as a held external record containing the exact reference identity, reported numerical inscription and observation provenance; the inscription never enters the proof as an SFT scalar.
title: Measured-value record separated from proof value
